post.summary: Opt the calling ExApp in to setup checks
post.description: The ExApp is identified from the authenticated `ex-app-id` header, so it can only ever opt itself in. Its live results are then fetched from the ExApp's `/setup_checks` endpoint by a background job and surfaced in the admin "Security & setup warnings" panel.

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: ExApp opted in to setup checks

delete.summary: Opt the calling ExApp out of setup checks

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: ExApp opted out of setup checks
